title: Idea Discovery
description_html:
Accelerator / fund / microbusiness scrape, clustered and tagged for finding SaaS + service microbusiness ideas.
Full-text search: add ?_search=... to any of the searchable tables below.

company_ideas.title: company_ideas — all scraped startup ideas (26K rows)
company_ideas.description: One row per (program, source_url). Full-text searchable over company, one_liner, long_description.

idea_extraction.title: idea_extraction — LLM-extracted launch flags + tags (7.2K rows)
idea_extraction.description: Full-text searchable over problem_statement, reasoning, and both tag axes.

idea_clusters.title: idea_clusters — HDBSCAN clusters + sub-clusters (1.6K)
idea_clusters.description: Hierarchical clustering. parent_cluster_id IS NULL = top-level. era_class flags hot / steady / rebuild_candidate / legacy.

website_enrichment.title: website_enrichment — homepage copy per unique domain (2.7K)
website_enrichment.description: Full-text searchable over title, meta_description, hero_h1, hero_text.

idea_extraction_tag_backup.title: idea_extraction_tag_backup (audit)
idea_extraction_tag_backup.description: Pre-canonicalization snapshot of tag arrays. Roll-back source if needed.

companies.title: companies — Handelsregister entities (2.2K)
companies.description: Target of the DACH match (not yet built).

stats.title: ▸ Pipeline stats
stats.sql: SELECT 'company_ideas' AS t, COUNT(*) AS n FROM company_ideas UNION ALL SELECT 'website_enrichment', COUNT(*) FROM website_enrichment UNION ALL SELECT 'idea_clusters', COUNT(*) FROM idea_clusters UNION ALL SELECT 'idea_extraction (ok)', COUNT(*) FROM idea_extraction WHERE error IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'idea_extraction (err)', COUNT(*) FROM idea_extraction WHERE error IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT 'distinct mechanisms', COUNT(DISTINCT mechanism) FROM v_mechanism_sector_cells UNION ALL SELECT 'distinct sectors', COUNT(DISTINCT sector) FROM v_mechanism_sector_cells UNION ALL SELECT 'populated cells', COUNT(*) FROM v_matrix UNION ALL SELECT 'launch candidates (loose)', COUNT(*) FROM v_launch_candidates_loose UNION ALL SELECT 'launch candidates (strict)', COUNT(*) FROM v_launch_candidates_strict

extraction_coverage.title: ▸ Extraction coverage by program
extraction_coverage.description: What's extracted vs. what's still waiting for LLM processing.
extraction_coverage.sql: SELECT ci.program, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN ie.company_idea_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS extracted, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN ie.company_idea_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 0) AS pct FROM company_ideas ci LEFT JOIN idea_extraction ie ON ie.company_idea_id = ci.id AND ie.error IS NULL GROUP BY ci.program ORDER BY total DESC

launch_candidates.title: LAUNCH: solo + ai-first + non-disqualifying moat (1,998)
launch_candidates.description: Main output. Moat filter rules out 'regulatory' and 'capital' — everything else is a microbusiness candidate. Sort by year_founded, filter via facets on the page.
launch_candidates.sql: SELECT ci.program, ci.company, ci.year_founded, ci.company_website, ie.problem_statement, ie.mechanism_tags, ie.sector_tags, ie.customer_size, ie.business_model, ie.moat_type, ie.niche_specificity, c.label AS cluster_label, c.era_class FROM idea_extraction ie JOIN company_ideas ci ON ci.id = ie.company_idea_id LEFT JOIN idea_clusters c ON c.cluster_id = ci.cluster_id WHERE ie.error IS NULL AND ie.solo_buildable = 1 AND ie.ai_first_advantage = 1 AND ie.moat_type NOT IN ('regulatory','capital') ORDER BY ci.year_founded DESC

launch_candidates_strict.title: LAUNCH: strict — solo + ai-first + no moat at all (1,198)
launch_candidates_strict.sql: SELECT * FROM v_launch_candidates_strict ORDER BY year_founded DESC

launch_candidates_narrow.title: LAUNCH: narrow-niche-only (tightest filter)
launch_candidates_narrow.description: Launch candidates where niche_specificity='narrow' — the most defensibly-scoped ideas.
launch_candidates_narrow.sql: SELECT ci.program, ci.company, ci.year_founded, ci.company_website, ie.problem_statement, ie.customer_verticals, ie.mechanism_tags, ie.sector_tags, ie.moat_type FROM idea_extraction ie JOIN company_ideas ci ON ci.id = ie.company_idea_id WHERE ie.error IS NULL AND ie.solo_buildable = 1 AND ie.ai_first_advantage = 1 AND ie.moat_type NOT IN ('regulatory','capital') AND ie.niche_specificity = 'narrow' ORDER BY ci.year_founded DESC

launch_candidates_by_program.title: LAUNCH: counts per program
launch_candidates_by_program.sql: SELECT ci.program, COUNT(*) AS n FROM idea_extraction ie JOIN company_ideas ci ON ci.id = ie.company_idea_id WHERE ie.solo_buildable=1 AND ie.ai_first_advantage=1 AND ie.moat_type NOT IN ('regulatory','capital') GROUP BY ci.program ORDER BY n DESC

recent_launches.title: LAUNCH: only 2025-2026
recent_launches.description: Newest crop of solo + ai-first ideas.
recent_launches.sql: SELECT ci.program, ci.company, ci.year_founded, ci.batch, ie.problem_statement, ie.mechanism_tags, ie.sector_tags FROM idea_extraction ie JOIN company_ideas ci ON ci.id = ie.company_idea_id WHERE ie.error IS NULL AND ie.solo_buildable = 1 AND ie.ai_first_advantage = 1 AND ie.moat_type NOT IN ('regulatory','capital') AND ci.year_founded >= 2025 ORDER BY ci.year_founded DESC, ci.id DESC

rebuild_candidates.title: CLUSTER: rebuild-candidate clusters
rebuild_candidates.description: Established spaces with median founding year ≤ 2018 and few recent entries — AI-first rewrite territory.
rebuild_candidates.sql: SELECT cluster_id, label, size, median_year, count_2023_plus, CASE WHEN parent_cluster_id IS NULL THEN 'parent' ELSE 'sub' END AS level, parent_cluster_id FROM idea_clusters WHERE era_class = 'rebuild_candidate' ORDER BY size DESC

hot_subclusters.title: CLUSTER: hot sub-clusters (2023+)
hot_subclusters.sql: SELECT cluster_id, label, size, median_year, count_2023_plus, parent_cluster_id, (SELECT label FROM idea_clusters WHERE cluster_id = c.parent_cluster_id) AS parent_label FROM idea_clusters c WHERE era_class='hot' AND parent_cluster_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY size DESC LIMIT 100

cluster_members.title: CLUSTER: drill — all members of :cluster_id
cluster_members.description: Pass a cluster_id as URL param.
cluster_members.sql: SELECT ci.company, ci.program, ci.batch, ci.year_founded, ci.one_liner, ci.company_website, ie.problem_statement, ie.mechanism_tags, ie.sector_tags, ie.solo_buildable, ie.ai_first_advantage FROM company_ideas ci LEFT JOIN idea_extraction ie ON ie.company_idea_id = ci.id WHERE ci.cluster_id = :cluster_id ORDER BY ci.year_founded DESC

cluster_siblings.title: CLUSTER: parent + all sub-clusters for :parent_id
cluster_siblings.description: Pass a parent cluster id. Shows the parent + all its children in one table.
cluster_siblings.sql: SELECT cluster_id, label, size, era_class, median_year, count_2023_plus, CASE WHEN cluster_id = :parent_id THEN 'parent' ELSE 'sub' END AS level FROM idea_clusters WHERE cluster_id = :parent_id OR parent_cluster_id = :parent_id ORDER BY (cluster_id = :parent_id) DESC, size DESC

mechanism_sector_matrix.title: MATRIX: full mechanism × sector
mechanism_sector_matrix.description: Every (mechanism, sector) cell with at least one company. Sort/filter by column.
mechanism_sector_matrix.sql: SELECT mechanism, sector, n, substr(example_companies, 1, 120) AS example_companies FROM v_matrix ORDER BY n DESC

mechanism_sector_drill.title: MATRIX: drill — companies in (:mechanism, :sector)
mechanism_sector_drill.sql: SELECT company, program, year_founded, customer_size, business_model, moat_type FROM v_mechanism_sector_cells WHERE mechanism = :mechanism AND sector = :sector ORDER BY year_founded DESC

empty_cells.title: MATRIX: empty cells (gaps)
empty_cells.description: Mechanisms used ≥30× AND sectors with ≥30 companies that never co-occur. Whitespace for recombination.
empty_cells.sql: WITH big_mechs AS (SELECT mechanism FROM v_mechanism_totals WHERE n >= 30), big_sectors AS (SELECT sector FROM v_sector_totals WHERE n >= 30), all_pairs AS (SELECT m.mechanism, s.sector FROM big_mechs m, big_sectors s), filled AS (SELECT DISTINCT mechanism, sector FROM v_matrix) SELECT ap.mechanism, ap.sector, (SELECT n FROM v_mechanism_totals WHERE mechanism = ap.mechanism) AS mech_total, (SELECT n FROM v_sector_totals WHERE sector = ap.sector) AS sector_total FROM all_pairs ap LEFT JOIN filled f ON f.mechanism = ap.mechanism AND f.sector = ap.sector WHERE f.mechanism IS NULL ORDER BY mech_total DESC, sector_total DESC

sparse_cells.title: MATRIX: sparse cells (n≤3)
sparse_cells.description: Populated but thin — potential underexploited niches.
sparse_cells.sql: SELECT mechanism, sector, n, example_companies FROM v_matrix WHERE n <= 3 AND mechanism IN (SELECT mechanism FROM v_mechanism_totals WHERE n >= 50) AND sector IN (SELECT sector FROM v_sector_totals WHERE n >= 30) ORDER BY n, mechanism, sector

top_mechanisms.title: MATRIX: top mechanisms
top_mechanisms.sql: SELECT mechanism, n FROM v_mechanism_totals ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 80

top_sectors.title: MATRIX: top sectors
top_sectors.sql: SELECT sector, n FROM v_sector_totals ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 80

company_profile.title: DRILL: full profile of :company_id
company_profile.description: Everything we have for one company_ideas.id, across scrape + enrichment + extraction + cluster.
company_profile.sql: SELECT ci.id, ci.program, ci.company, ci.batch, ci.year_founded, ci.country, ci.company_website, ci.one_liner, ci.long_description, ci.tags_json, ie.problem_statement, ie.customer_verticals, ie.mechanism_tags, ie.sector_tags, ie.customer_size, ie.business_model, ie.solo_buildable, ie.solo_buildable_reasoning, ie.ai_first_advantage, ie.ai_first_reasoning, ie.moat_type, ie.niche_specificity, we.title AS web_title, we.meta_description AS web_meta, we.hero_h1 AS web_h1, substr(we.hero_text, 1, 1000) AS web_hero_text_preview, c.label AS cluster_label, c.era_class, c.size AS cluster_size, (SELECT label FROM idea_clusters WHERE cluster_id = c.parent_cluster_id) AS parent_cluster_label FROM company_ideas ci LEFT JOIN idea_extraction ie ON ie.company_idea_id = ci.id LEFT JOIN website_enrichment we ON we.normalized_website = ci.normalized_website LEFT JOIN idea_clusters c ON c.cluster_id = ci.cluster_id WHERE ci.id = :company_id

missing_extraction_by_program.title: DEBUG: rows awaiting LLM extraction
missing_extraction_by_program.description: Mostly Show HN right now — blocked on API credits.
missing_extraction_by_program.sql: SELECT ci.program, COUNT(*) AS waiting FROM company_ideas ci LEFT JOIN idea_extraction ie ON ie.company_idea_id = ci.id WHERE ie.company_idea_id IS NULL GROUP BY ci.program ORDER BY waiting DESC

show_hn_by_month.title: PROGRAM: Show HN posts by month
show_hn_by_month.sql: SELECT batch AS year_month, COUNT(*) AS n FROM company_ideas WHERE program = 'Show HN' GROUP BY batch ORDER BY batch DESC
